construction.title: 53 Internal forces in a beam - superposition

input.a1: Centroid[Polygon[FP0, FP1, FP2, FP3, FP4, FP5, FP6, FP7, FP8, FP9, FP10, C, FP0]]

expression.label: text2
expression.exp: "q = " + loadP + " kN / m (" + (loadP / scaleForceDiagram) + " units) L = " + beam + " m (" + beam + " units) R = q * L = " + ((loadP * beam)) + " kN (" + ((loadP * beam / scaleForceDiagram)) + " units)"
